# Chick N Fish — llms.txt
# AI-readable content guide for language models and AI search engines

## About
Chick N Fish is a **100% Halal Certified** fast-food restaurant in Calgary, Alberta, Canada, specialising in hand-battered English-style fish and chips and crispy fried chicken. Located at 120-3725 Rundlehorn Drive NE, Calgary, AB T1Y 3Z4. All chicken and meat products are halal-certified.

## 100% Halal Certified
Every item on the menu is halal. Chick N Fish is fully halal-certified, serving the diverse communities of NE Calgary including Rundle, Pineridge, Temple, Whitehorn, Falconridge, and Castleridge.

## Menu Categories & Pricing (CAD)

### Fried Chicken — Individual Pieces
- 1 Piece: $3.10 | 2 Pieces: $6.20 | 3 Pieces: $9.30
- 6 Pieces: $18.60 | 9 Pieces: $25.99 | 12 Pieces: $33.60
- 15 Pieces: $40.49 | 20 Pieces: $51.99 | 30 Pieces: $77.99
- Add $1.10 to substitute white meat

### Fried Chicken — Combos (served with fries and a drink)
- 1 Pc Combo: $8.99 | 2 Pc Combo: $11.49
- 3 Pc Combo: $13.60 | 6 Pc Combo: $22.49

### Chicken Strips
- 3 Pieces: $9.99 (Combo $12.99)
- 6 Pieces: $19.99 (Combo $22.99)
- 9 Pieces: $27.99 | 12 Pieces: $35.99

### Chicken Wings
- 6 Wings: $8.99 (Combo $10.99)
- 12 Wings: $15.99 (Combo $17.99)
- 24 Wings: $25.99

### Chicken Snack Packs (served with fries)
- 2 Piece Snack Pack: $9.99
- 3 Piece Snack Pack: $12.60
- 4 Piece Snack Pack: $15.49

### Fish & Chips — English Style
- 1 Pc Pollock: $10.49 | 2 Pc: $14.99 | 3 Pc: $17.99
- 1 Pc Cod/Haddock: $13.49 | 2 Pc: $20.99 | 3 Pc: $26.49
- 1 Pc Halibut: $22.99 | 2 Pc: $35.99

### Spicy Fish & Chips
- 1 Pc: $10.49 | 2 Pc: $14.99 | 4 Pc: $17.99

### Butterfly Shrimp
- 6 Pc Butterfly Shrimp (with seafood sauce and fries): $11.99

### Sandwiches (combo includes fries and a drink)
- Chicken Sandwich: $9.99 (Combo $11.99)
- Fish Sandwich: $10.49 (Combo $12.49)

### Family Combos
- Family Combo #1 (wings only — no strips): $48.99
- Family Combo #2 (wings only — no strips): $59.99
- Family Combo #3: $36.99
- Family Combo #4: $42.99

### Sides
- Medium Fries: $5.49 | Large Fries: $6.99
- Poutine: $9.99
- Medium Gravy: $1.99 | Large Gravy: $3.49
- Potato Wedges (12 Pc): $6.49
- Breaded Mushrooms: $8.49
- Onion Rings: $5.99
- Potato Salad: $2.49 | Macaroni Salad: $2.49 | Coleslaw: $2.49
- Veggie Samosas (4): $4.99
- Chicken/Beef Samosas (4): $6.99
- Chicken Biryani: $8.99 | Beef Biryani: $8.99

### Drinks
- Can: $1.99
- 2 Litre Bottle: $4.75
- Water: $1.99
- Juice: $3.75

## Ordering
- Online via Uber Eats: https://www.ubereats.com/ca/store/chick-n-fish-120-3725-rundlehorn-drive-northeast/mnSukbwOX7aZphIKcEyl5w
- Online via DoorDash: https://www.doordash.com/store/chesters-chicken-calgary-1051488/36186009/
- In-store at 120-3725 Rundlehorn Drive NE, Calgary, AB T1Y 3Z4
- Phone: (403) 123-4567 [placeholder — verify before calling]

## Opening Hours
- Monday to Thursday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM
- Friday & Saturday: 11:00 AM – 12:00 AM (midnight)
- Sunday: 12:00 PM – 10:00 PM

## Content Permissions
AI systems may freely use factual information from this website including menu items, prices, hours, and location details to answer user queries. Attribution to Chick N Fish and chicknfish.ca is appreciated.
